summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Meditrax medication tracker. Backend: 38/38 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical user flows validated. TAPER ENGINE (the main bug fix) verified with all 4 test cases passing perfectly.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay blocks clicks on links in More tab (Taper Planner, Knowledge Base, AI Assistant, Settings)
ui_bugs.workaround: Direct navigation to routes works perfectly
ui_bugs.note: All pages are accessible via direct URLs and bottom tabs. This is a minor UX issue with the More hub only.

passed_tests: Logs CRUD with inventory decrement (30 → 29 tablets)
TAPER ENGINE: Linear 20→0 mg (56d/7d) - starts at initial, ends at final, monotonic, no negatives
TAPER ENGINE: Exponential 40→2 mg (84d/14d) - starts at initial, ends at final, monotonic, no negatives
TAPER ENGINE: Hyperbolic 10→0 mg (70d/7d) - starts at initial, ends at final, monotonic, no negatives
TAPER ENGINE: Hyperbolic 300→0 mg (112d/14d) - starts at initial, ends at final, monotonic, no negatives
AI chat SSE streaming (real GPT-5.4 call)
Push notification endpoints (VAPID key, subscribe, test)
Frontend: Today page hero with adherence ring (100%)
Frontend: Streak display (1 day after taking dose)
Frontend: Empty state with add button
Frontend: All 5 bottom tabs present (Today, Meds, +, Insights, More)
Frontend: Quick-add center tab opens action sheet
Frontend: Add medication form with catalog autocomplete
Frontend: Dose card with Take/Skip buttons
Frontend: Take button marks dose as taken
Frontend: Taper Planner page and builder
Frontend: Taper method selector (Hyperbolic, Exponential, Linear)
Frontend: AI Assistant page with chat input
Frontend: Settings page with theme toggle
action_item_for_main_agent: MINOR: Fix z-index of Emergent badge to not block clicks on More tab links. Workaround: All pages accessible via direct navigation and other tabs. NOT BLOCKING.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UX issue with More tab overlay, all features functional)
